testcases.input: apples = [1,2,3,5,2], days = [3,2,1,4,2] Output: 7 Explanation: You can eat 7 apples: - On the first day, you eat an apple that grew on the first day. - On the second day, you eat an apple that grew on the second day. - On the third day, you eat an apple that grew on the second day. After this day, the apples that grew on the third day rot. - On the fourth to the seventh days, you eat apples that grew on the fourth day.
